reviews.review_text: Simply Lovely
Good
Very family friendly and a close walk to the beach and not a far walk to the Jetty where you can see the sting rays up close.

Disappointing first time stay over the weekend here. Camp sites are tiny and cramped. Toilets and showers are limited and in pretty rough shape. Only 1 camp kitchen which is miles away from a lot of the sites makes cooking/cleaning difficult. The only saving grace was the water park which the kids enjoyed all be it very crowded during the day. For $180 a night per site I really expected more for a Big 4 park. The pedestrian key system is outdated and single car only policy makes setting up / packing up very challenging if you're in multiple cars.

Night maintenance staff were friendly and helpful.

We stayed as a family of six with two cars (no pets) during school holidays. While it’s clearly designed as a kid-focused park, we found it overwhelming and not very enjoyable as parents.

The splash park had very limited seating (only a handful of chairs a gew benches would've been great!) and no toilets or change rooms - you have to leave the spalsh park facility. It’s also separate from the pool, which made things difficult with multiple kids wanting to be in different areas. Having to take children across a cold, wet lawn just to use the bathroom was far from ideal. The pool itself was quite small and extremely crowded, and with only one toilet per gender nearby, it wasn’t the most comfortable setup.

There are strict rules around food and drinks in the pool area, which are heavily enforced by staff, making it hard to relax while supervising kids - think no snacks or a drink. Facilities were clean but dated and could use an upgrade.

The one-car-per-site rule (due to fire policy) was frustrating, especially given there were empty sites available. With a larger family, two cars were necessary, and having to unload kids in the rain at the gate wasn’t a great experience.

The park layout is quite compact with limited space to walk or relax. There aren’t open grassy areas to unwind, and overall it felt crowded and overstimulating, with a lot of rules to navigate.

If you’re after a place purely for kids and don’t mind a busy, rule-heavy environment, it might suit you. For us, it just wasn’t the right fit.
Fantastic holiday park for a young family with plenty of activities within the grounds. A stones throw away from main city centre as well.
Facilities are fantastic and the kids had an amazing time. Plenty of activities for the kids in the caravan park.
This place is an absolute beauty . Definitely recommend to those with children and the prices are very reasonable
Bit dusty

Great location & friendly helpful staff!
I give 4 stars, only because as a single person in a tent it was not relaxing at all. People coming at going from 7am-10:30pm and it was so noisy. This park is perfect for families with kids or a motorhome/ caravan up the back on the concrete slab area. Lots of kids!
I went to the office to get some wine (which was nice) and told the ladies why and they sympathised and offered to move me to the foreshore park instead where it was quieter but I was so exhausted and all setup so didn’t have the capacity to move again. The Equinox festival was on that weekend which was a nice surprise I loved it…
I was there to have work done on my car and Ubers were never available so spent double the amount on taxis. Maybe the park could have an arrangement with a local service at a discount. The amenities were clean, I didn’t go near the pool as I knew it’d be busy with kids. I’ll be back! but on a foreshore site.
Wonderful friendly reception. Excellent park, well facilitated. Had a great nights stay

We had the best time! The location is amazing, the caravan park is clean, the staff are super friendly and there’s soooooo much to do!
We can’t wait to go back again!
Super clean Room..Reception Staff extremely helpful and friendly…
Great stay but water pressure wasnt up to scratch with during the busy weekend
The park was amazing so good for kids and families,

We left our stay at the Big 4 in Inverloch with quite mixed feelings.

The facilities are a real highlight, the air-filled jump pad, pump track, playground, aquatic park, and indoor pool were all excellent and clearly well maintained.

Unfortunately, the accommodation didn’t match that standard, particularly given the price. We stayed in a two-bedroom cabin that showed clear signs of age and wear, along with some persistent odours. Space was also an issue, the main bedroom couldn’t accommodate a porta cot, and the second bedroom only just managed to fit one, which made things quite cramped.

The most frustrating part of our stay was the handling of the common room. On the first night, it was effectively taken over by a group of older travellers, making it difficult for others to use. While not ideal, this can happen in shared spaces. However, on the second night, our group, along with other guests, were watching the football when staff asked us to leave so they could set up a “movie night.” We were then told the same group from the previous night had booked the area.

There was no indication that the “common” area could be reserved in this way, and it ended up being unavailable to other guests for both nights of our stay. Given this was the only shared space of its kind available, this felt poorly managed and unfair, especially for something advertised as a shared facility.

Overall, while the facilities are great, the accommodation and management of shared spaces left us disappointed and didn’t reflect the premium price point.

Great place, especially for kids. So many activities. Love the cafe at the corner and the bar/food trucks next door at night. Grass site feels a little bit crammed on a busy weekend but can’t have it all!

Great location- literally a minute walk to the beach.
Staff are friendly & helpful.
We stayed in the 2 bedroom ensuite cabin, it was very basic, basic was all we needed.
It’s a good place for kids- the indoor pool was a hit with the kids, there is a basketball court, scooter track, huge air pillow- bouncing area & the pedal karts.

I would definitely return to this park for the following reasons:
The cabin was spotlessly clean, bed was comfy & warm.
The staff are very friendly & accommodating
The water slides & heated pool are a big hit with both small & big kids
The whole park is well maintained & clean
Just a short walk to the beach & the main town. The local pub has good food & service & plenty of cafes.
Will return with our caravan next time.

A wonderful holiday and our powered c/van site was changed for us at our request upon arrival. Despite being busy nothing was too much. Facilities clean, activities for all, good security and close to everything. Thanks.

Best drive through sites we have ever seen. Friendly helpful staff added to the positive experience. Easy day trip to Phillip Island so 2 items ticked off our bucket list. Highly recommend this park. 10/10
Very comfortable for our short last minute stay

We had an amazing stay at this Big4 accommodation with our kids! The place was beautifully maintained, giving us such a sense of comfort.
We stayed in the 3 bedroom coastal villa.
It was just a short stroll to the beach, however there was no beach access from our cabin which we felt was little disappointing.
The indoor water play was perfect for those wet weather days. Staff were lovely and helpful.
Had a great time 🙂

We booked an ensuite site for our camper and it was perfect! A great sized ensuite provided the extra convenience while camping with our 3 kids. The park was well maintained and has great facilities for the whole family. Great location too, very close to the beach and a short walk to town. Highly recommend a stay at this holiday park!

Wonderful park especially for kids. I stayed here with my 2 year old and she absolutely loved the indoor water park. They also have a great playground, and bouncing pillow.
The staff were welcoming and helpful, location is great, just moments to the beach, short drive into town (though you could walk into town if you wanted to strech your legs)
On the night we stayed there was live music and food vans at The Sand Bar, which is literally a 1 minute walk from the park.
The cabin we stayed in was immaculate, a good size and comfy beds.
Highly recommend, we'll be back for sure!
Beautiful location. Very friendly staff. Amenities could be a little more spacious.

Great park, especially for the kids! They loved the splash park, playground, pump track and the jumping pillow!
Clean and tidy (dump point was very average with people not disposing correctly).
Only down fall is that there is no disabled amenities and we travelled with friends who required the amenities.
Staff were fantastic.park is great for kids.everything clean and tidy.
One of the best parks we have stayed at. Our drive through site was great. Stayed 5 nights. Will go back for sure

The staff, at both the original booking, then at the book in, were very polite friendly and helpful.
We had to , at the last moment we had to cancel two cabins in our group, the caring staff handled the refund swirly.
The cabins were very spacious and well equipped.  The recreation areas were amazing for the 6 children in our group, they were outside and active the whole time.  And the location is just so handy to everything.  Cannot recommend his park enough.
We had a lovely time at Inverloch, the campground was well located to the beach and nice stroll into town. The facilities and entertainment at the park were great.
Great park, amenities excellent , service top class.

Overpriced, cramped, and poor management—avoid this park.

I would never stay here again and strongly recommend others look elsewhere. Our experience was disappointing from the moment we arrived until we left.

Terrible Check-in Experience: We arrived for a late check-in and were given no specific instructions on where our keys would be left. While we were trying to figure it out, our kids entered the park using the boom gate code.

Boom Gate Issues: We quickly discovered that the boom gate code only allows one entry; once the kids used it, we couldn't get our car in. When we asked the staff for help, they were incredibly rude and dismissive rather than being helpful.

Small & Overpriced: For the premium price we paid, the "2-bedroom cabin" was tiny and cramped. The entire park felt congested, with very little breathing room between sites or cabins.

Save your money and your sanity—stay somewhere that actually values its guests.

It's a shame this place now seems to be overrun by adolescents on electric scooters. It used to be a very family friendly park, when I came here two years ago. But I did not feel safe trying to teach my children to ride a bike with teenagers and adults flying along the roads on escooters, ebikes and hoverboards. Management need to crack down and police this as it ruins the feeling of safety.

They are not allowed according to their rules, but I never saw staff do anything about it and many of them were riding in and out of the park, past the management office. They also continued after dusk, some with no lights. So you really had to listen carefully for them when walking at night.

Other than that, the park is well run. Clean, and well maintained. Cabins and camp sites are pretty packed in but that's  normal with these holiday parks

Other guests were generally friendly and well behaved. A few campers up late chatting and laughing but no loud music and it didn't keep me awake. Dogs are allowed and dog owners all seemed to have their dogs on leash and there was never excessive barking or any issues.

Wifi was good. Hot water was hit and miss in our cabin and even the water didn't work sometimes. Maybe something to do with the place being fully booked? But everything else worked well.

I really hope they can do something to address the escooters as they had established itself as a very family friendly park safe for young children.
Great park but very expensive toilets were messy and rubbish bins were over flowing.
Park is good however amenties are in poor condition especially the showers. The water pressure was terrible resulting in water trickling out of the showerhead

Cabins were great. Floors not clean and showers had a bit of mould around the bottom. Otherwise cabins were very clean and had plenty of supplies (dishwashing liquid, washing powder, toilet paper and washes).
Towels and pool towels provided.  Beds are comfortable.

Cabin was really noisy as it was right next to the children's activities. Not relaxing at all. We booked for 2 adults, so it was strange to be put right next to a basketball court and bike ramp.

Dog friendly cabin with no grassed area, so had to walk to grassy communal areas each time she needed the toilet (not ideal in the rain at night).

Office staff were really lovely!

No point having Big 4 membership at all!

Location of the park is pretty good!

Maps supplied for dog friendly beaches is out of date (2024) so check online for accurate information.

We had a wonderful week long stay,
The kids adored the staff member Grace & we loved that there was always a staff member around.

The concreted drive thru sites were so great. Plenty of room and we especially loved the speed bumps on the road keeping people from driving fast!! Well done.

Awesome place for families with the absolutley amazing indoor water activities and so many other indoor and outdoor activities.
Close walking distance for access to beach.
Staff were very friendly , welcoming and helpful.
Security access system was excellent making the complex feel safe
We just stayed 5 nights at a powered site with our 21 month old and will be back! We had a wonderful stay. Everything is there for the kids and it’s close to town and very close to the beach.

We had a wonderful stay at this caravan park and would highly recommend it to families. The park was very clean, well-maintained, and had excellent amenities for kids, including a great playground and a swimming pool that they really enjoyed.

The location is perfect — the beach is only about a 5-minute walk, which made it easy for us to enjoy relaxing walks and the beautiful views. There are also plenty of restaurants and shops nearby, just around a 15-minute walk, which was very convenient.

Overall, it’s a fantastic place for a family holiday. The facilities, cleanliness, and location made our stay comfortable and enjoyable. We would definitely love to come back again.

Great caravan park. We stayed in a cabin, that was good, clean. The only thing was the carpet was due for a clean. The park has a great indoor pool and a water park for kids, one of the best. Close to a good beach. Helpfull staff.

Took our caravan there for four nights first timers. Well run park, great amenities especially if you have dogs or kids. We had a nice grassy spot next our friends which was a bonus. Definitely a quality caravan park which reflects in the cost per night but we got 20% discount for four nights. Very close to the beach and walking distance to the town which has a great pub on the corner . Great place to stay..
Great place to stay and staff could not be more helpful
Amazing staff and facilities, I would highly recommend bringing families here. Lots to do and see.

Great for young families and great location so close to the water and short walk to town. The park has a good pool ( needs to be a little warmer) and great kids indoor water park. The pump track for scooters and bikes was excellent. Overall with some more upgrades to modernise facilities this will be a great destination. The sites are quite tight in some areas be sure to check your van size first. The newer drive through artificial grass powered sites were excellent.

We recently stayed at BIG4 Inverloch Holiday Park and unfortunately were quite disappointed with our experience.

Firstly, the staff were great  friendly and helpful throughout our stay  so no complaints there.

However, the two-bedroom cabin we booked was extremely small and felt very overpriced for what it was, especially for a family. The park itself also felt very cramped and overcrowded, which made it hard to relax and enjoy our time away.

When we tried to use the pool, there was a large group (around 15 people) playing games and kids screaming loudly. There didn’t seem to be much consideration for other guests, and it was unbearable to stay, so we left. The splash park was good and the kids enjoyed that.

We also tried the food truck on site and unfortunately found the food very basic and bland also the vending machine was not working so we couldn't get the kids a treat at the time.

Later that evening, a large group set up chairs right outside our cabin. With the thin cabin walls, we could hear everything, which made getting the kids to bed very difficult. Thankfully, they left around 10pm.

Overall, we regret booking here and won’t be staying again. It’s a shame because the staff were lovely, but the overcrowding, noise, and value for money really let the experience down.
My 1st visit, next time I would like to be at the foreshore sites.

Great big 4! Good location with a short walk to the beach and 5 min drive into main town. Lots of activities to keep the kids entertained Inc, jumping pillow, mini golf, pump track and indoor swimming pool and splash pad. Staff were very friendly.

The only negative feedback I have is that the floor in our cabin could have been mopped better, having bare feet our feet came up black. The cabin otherwise was pretty clean.
Caravan site, amenities close and well looked after.

Perfect location.
The room was very clean and had everything that we needed.
Comfy bed and nice, warm doona.
Definitely will return.
Powered tent site was perfect, big enough for everything, water park and pump track kept the kids busy all day, loved it here will be back soon

Super family friendly, majority of the non concrete sites were full of trees and beautiful. I wouldn’t want to camp on the concrete RV sites only as they were just slabs of concrete on top of each other. The rest of the park was beautiful
Great location and facilities were excellent. Just be prepared for a lot of kids around,which in turn was very loud at times.
Loved our accommodation and everything we could do in the park. Had a ball
We had a fabulous stay for 3 nights! Grassed site with ensuite. Lovely site, very clean and very welcoming. Easy walking to town. See you again next year! Thank you

We stayed in a tent and the stand and facilities were well maintained. My only complaint is the water play area, there is just too much water spraying everywhere, I feel more research is needed to make the experience better for all ages.

Paid $30 more for a powered site than other places so far. Disappointed to find no cooking utensils eg. Fry pan, saucepan, tongs etc.
Spoilt our plans for the night.
Also shower at about 10pm that night, almost cold!
Kitchen and amenities were clean and nice.
Great place thanks

My husband and I have been Camping at the BIG4 Ingenia every year for the past five years. What started with us just staying there in our tent in that first year became a big friends and family pilgrimage at the same time every year in January. It ended up being six families with a good mix of adults and kids with some staying on the caravan sites and some staying in the cabins. For the first few years, we absolutely loved it. The park offered amazing swimming facilities for the kids, great food trucks, Nice cabins and pretty well maintained caravan sites and we were all really excited to go every year. Unfortunately, the third year in the prices started to climb substantially and we also noticed in that particular year some of the amenities dropped in quality to the point where some of the members of our party complained to reception about the cleanliness of some of the amenities. We were also a bit unhappy about the date restrictions on some of their caravan/tent sites that resulted in one family of our big party not returning after that. The other members of our group decided to stay on another few more years as we had taken the time over the years to reserve our spots to be close to one another but every year the price kept climbing and we started to question if it was worth it after three years in a row of price hikes, especially as a lot of us had stayed at many other caravan parks around Victoria that offered the same experiences at a lower price. This year thankfully the price of the sites hasn’t skyrocketed again but we just found out that our friends that has stayed in the cabins got a really massive hit. Also the caravan sites that we have stayed in for many years has deteriorated to a point where we just can’t justify staying there any more. We are older and wiser and like I said have had many other experiences in caravan parks around Victoria that makes it very difficult to justify the price that Ingenia Inverloch continues to push without any evidence of higher quality overall in their park to justify this. To be honest, we feel like it’s daylight robbery. Finally we decided to stay elsewhere with our group next year and just to make matters worse when we cancelled our long time booking, their response was really disappointing and management couldn’t care less that they had lost long time clients and many groups of families. This park really needs to take a look at themselves and start providing some justification for many years of ridiculous price hikes. Very disappointing to say the least.
Great place to stay and visit the surrounding areas

We stayed on a grass site. The sites are smaller than other parks, felt a bit sqashed in.
There is also no disability toilets, the existing toilets are very narrow and tight to get around. I have a walker to get around and this was stressful. The location, staff and all the splash pool, heated pool and areas for children are fantastic. We want to come back with our grandchildren.
Our Family had a terrific time and enjoyed all the amenities, rooms were great and service was excellent.
Fantastic stay great staff very helpful will certainly be back and bring with us another family 👍👏👌✅✅✅
First time staying and very impressed with the amount of children activities! Will definitely come back another time soon!

Good deluxe cabin.  Fully equipped, had everything we needed .   Only issue was parking as very tight where we were with our  4 door Ute and another big 4 wheel drive vehicle parked right behind ours.  Easy access to Andersons inlet across road and close proximity to town centre.  Friendly staff and good amenities for young families.  Will be back again 👍

The unit we had was very well appointed, with all amenities required. The staff assistance was great (friendly an professional), and the location of the site was very handy to the town centre. We really enjoyed our time there. Thoroughly recommended.

Really great holiday park! Our 3-year-old loved the pool and splashpark, jumping pillow and playground. We didn't use the pump track but saw it was very popular. Comfortable cabin and great location - so close to the corner store, sandbar and kid-friendly beach.
Staff are very helpful ,lovely big park good facilities

Poor handling of a simple late check-out request. We are a young family with two children (2 and 5 years old) and requested an 11am check-out. On arrival, we were told to ask in the morning and that it would be manageable. The next day, one staff member suggested 10:30am, but another then refused and insisted on a 10am check-out. This lack of consistency was frustrating, especially when the park was very quiet with only a few families and many empty cabins. With a 3pm check-in, there was ample time to prepare rooms.
On the positive side, the amenities are excellent, the location is great, and it’s a fantastic park for kids. Overall, a good stay, but flexibility and clearer communication need improvement.

Hi, one night in D16 cabin. Two older adult men , one lady and two small Jack Russell’s. We were expecting a small courtyard? Dogs could easily push open wire door and escape. No enclosure anywhere. Car was damaged trying to reverse into small car park  space  on left hand side , told to park there! Difficult 3 point Turn . It’s a small car! One key set for three adults!!  Ridiculous storage in main bedroom? Plastic bowls and tumblers
Great van site and location as always. Amenities in much need of a makeover. They were very run down and not very clean this time round which was somewhat disappointing
We love the pool and water park!

AMAZING PLACES for KIDs
has eveything clean fun excellent service
Perfect location, great on-site facilities rooms was decent and bed was comfy. Only problem was the loud bathroom exhaust and no towels for use in a cabin.

We have just had our 3rd year in a row stay at big4 inverloch! We love this park, so many things to do for families and activities and extra food trucks and services they get in! Facilities are great, close to town if we need anything, take away options and everything close, so close to the beach, the lolly bag on arrival was so perfect to help keep the kids happy in the car while we reversed into our site which can be a stressful time! Overall fantastic stay and can’t wait for next year!
Perfect location, friendly staff, clean facilities, endless activities of fun! Can’t wait to book another stay here!

Great location, not enough amenities and are in need of an upgrade. The block near us was shut twice that we know of due to blockages.I was yelled at from a distance while I was on my EBIke (Stationary)by a very rude staff member and told that EBIkes are prohibited inside the caravan park. Little did he know that the battery was not on nor did I use the battery while I was riding inside the caravan park. The speed limit is 10 klm per hour which he and the rest of the staff give no regard. We witnessed several near misses with the electric vehicles and small children. There is a lot of activities for the children but will not be back anytime in the near future.We have booked into the nearby RACV Club looks great and a LOT cheaper

Stayed with grandchildren on an ensuite caravan site
Wide internal road made parking van easy
Ensuite shower / toilet made camping easy with young children
Facilities generally were great
I was extremely disappointed the game room had no less than 8 claw machines . These are highly attractive to children and use of them is surely akin to gambling

Some of the staff were inconsistent with the requirement of helmets.  This is especially an issue when dealing with kids as they need consistency with rules as it can often be triggering.   And when spoken to staff about this, her response was that some staff are young and just don’t know…this is not a reason for inconsistency as they are staff and should enforce it if it is a rule
Caravan park is good, but our powered site which was over $200 was mostly uneven dirt.  Had to arrange our tent so we could find a flat surface.

Spot on for familys, the full Big 4 experience. Went camping with another family at the park, facilities for the kids are amazing (has everything you could think of), including entertainment. Staff are very friendly too. Beach is 50m from the park entrance and there is a general store on the corner. Safe and family friendly, kids rode their bikes everywhere and joined in cricket and splash park play. We wanted to extend our stay after the first night but unfortunately fully booked. Can imagine coming back many times.

Extremely disappointed that we were not informed that the park is dog friendly after they changed their policy post our booking. It cost us a lot of money to have our dog minded locally. A meek apology doesn’t really cut it.

We had a lovely time at Inverloch. The kids had the best time and lived the splash pool and jumping pillow. Lovely staff and great patrols at night keeping the park quiet after 10:00. Nice and safe for the kids and everyone very respectful when driving in and out of the park.

Great experience, love the park.
Would be great to have a larger amenities block down the back.

We stayed at one of the safari tents which was clean and comfortable. Safari tents are not great with the wind (which can't be helped) but apart from that? it was a lovely stay. Kids can roam around comfortably unsupervised.

The park is the best we have ever been to! So much for kids to do and it’s all inclusive. We stayed in an EcoTent and it was amazing but noisy with the wind, not the parks fault, we chose a really windy time to be here.

The indoor splash park and pool were a big hit and all weather! We highly recommend the park.

We called for a last minute booking and we were so well accommodated. The staff are so friendly and welcoming.

We have rebooked for next year so we don’t miss out!

The facilities were very good and very family friendly. So many activities for all ages.
The cabin was old, cramped, one bedroom smelt musty, the bunk bed  mattresses were very thin and uncomfortable and the cost was far too expensive for what we had. It was January, peak season so we expected to pay a lot but also expected better accommodation.
The service was prompt and the staff were helpful and friendly.
The location was excellent.
Extremely clean park.
We are regulars the last 5 years and every time we come we notice several improvements. They take feedback on board and service is always impeccable. Staff are caring and attentive.
The staff here are amazing. Always smiling and very helpful. I left something in our cabin and they successfully passed it onto to our friends who were still at the holiday park.
Lovely summer holiday spot.  Thank you

Loved our stay here, great location, great campsite, tight fit getting in with the van when all the sites were full. Toilet blocks getting close to needing a freshening up.
Splash zone and pool were enjoyed by the kids.
Crazy busy during January.  .  Staff not able to keep up with cleanliness in toilets.  Probably not enough toilets to people .  Great location.  Pricey for caravan site even for peak in my opinion

We stayed at powered site .
Kids loved splash pool and swimminng pool.
Staff and service was great .
20 min walk to town centre .
Overall great

Great things for kids do. Jumping pillow really bouncy, hire bikes good fun but pricey. Pool was terrific. Toilet block needs a lot of renovations ie dripping taps, faulty shower heads. Poor internet. Staff extremely friendly and helpful. Code is really long to remember for gate.

Suggestions:
1/ Please clean the washing machines and dryers
2/ There needs to be a filtered drinking fountain for everyone to use near the outdoor playground  the water in the rooms was not nice drinking water

The only good thing about this place is that kids can walk around freely and ride their bikes
Felt safe as every one else is their for the same thing plus there are cameras everywhere 👍👍
It’s great to go with another family
Three to four days is more then
Enough time …otherwise it’s the same thing every day ….. pools water park bounce pillow and outdoor playground

Great family destination! Has all the entertainment for the kids.
Great service from all staff.
Great park. Clean and tidy facilities. A winner for the kids with a pool, splash play area, pump track, jumping pillow, etc, Dog friendly. And the staff are all lovely. We will definitely come back!

Very busy. Sites are super tight and small. Challenging 4 vans to get in and out. You are literally on top of each other it’s that busy. Indoor water park. Small indoor pool - hard on the eyes. Very chlorinated. The games room is awful. Full of cheap claw games that parents are harassed $ for. We stayed  3 years ago and it was a really cool space - not now. Table tennis $10 per day hire. Small playground. Jumping pillow. Small Skate park. Lots of very small kids scooting around in bikes : scooters, so be careful driving here. Good security re gates and entry / exit. 3 years ago a security guard was on duty patrolling till midnight. Not now. 2am noisy neighbours and no one cares. It’s a family park. Rules are rules. 10pm quiet. Facilities are very small 4 the size of the park. Good big camp kitchen. Great location to the beach and walk to town. Would not come back. Expensive ++++ in high season. I’ve stayed at much better Big 4’s with the kids. Wouldn’t return.
Packing was an issue, only one carpark for a 3 bedroom apartment, we had 2 families with 5 children to unpack cars was really difficult with only one car allowed

We had a fantastic family holiday with you. We stayed in 3 separate cabins next year we hope to get 3 closer together
Everything was great but the only comment I would make is that several of the children and some of the adults got cuts on their feet in the indoor pool, the surface was a bit rough
We are looking forward to holidaying there again next January

We had an amazing stay at Inverloch. The staff at reception were very friendly and knowledgeable on the area. The maintenance team were wonderful helping us out when wind threatened our awning. The food and coffee vans were great. Excellent quality and variety. Can’t wait for our next visit

Felt like we were squished in like sardines…
Worse experience ever!
We were all just finished setting up our camping site when we just sat down to have a caravan pull up next to us… all the amendies were all plugged in right where out tent entrance and cooking area was already set up… their hot water service was pumping out heat right where my kids were sitting, they flooded our cooking area when they didnt plug in their pipe to drain their grey water out..
then when my 4 children age between 11/2 through to 10 couldnt aleep as people wouldnt keep their voices down till 11:30/midnight.
We stayed only one night.. out of 4 nights we had booked for….
No other room available for us to move our set up either…

On a positive note…. Splash park, pool, go carts all extra activities were great and the cleanliness of the facilities were amazing too..

But unfortunately we will not be staying there ever again.

Awesome caravan park, in a fantastic location, staff very friendly and helpful. However unfortunately this year, after 12 straight years, we found our lovely, lush grass sites (as advertised) a combination of attempted replantation of rolled out turf (dead) and crushed rock. With the rising cost of sites over the years, we expect better. Ensuite door clip is broken, which meant door did not close. This caused flooding during showers. Fixing these improvements, would 100% give a 5 star.

We love our stay in Inverloch.
It's the second year we've been, the facilities at times are a let down. The pool could do with some good cleaning and the toilet blocks at times were quite miserable.
We love the large drive through sites and being able to walk into town and the inlet. Disappointing that the price was so high this time around and I think it could be looked at.
Great location, activities for the kids and short walk to beach and shops.

Staff were friendly
Nice clean park
Plenty for kids to do

Great Holiday Park, my family and  I stayed for 4 nights in a luxury cabin and it was fantastic! The cabin was extremely clean upon arrival and the dishwasher, clothes washer and dryer were a surprise but very appreciated! Well equipped kitchen and the beds were quite comfy (even the kids bunk beds were good). The park itself is close to town and a short walk to the beach which was handy. The splash park (albeit a bit noisy) and pool was a great way to wind down after a day of sightseeing. Overall the facilities were very good and the grounds are kept in top condition, my only issue was the staff on checkout seemed a bit rushed and brushed off my complaint regarding the faulty wristbands that we were given (perhaps i got someone having a bad morning).  Apart from that, i recommend this park for a family stay as there is lots to do along the coast and the park is nice to come 'home' to... Well done Big4 Ingenia Inverloch.
We had a wonderful stay. The only thing was it was a little pricey for a one night Unpowered site.

We’ve been staying at Ingenia Inverloch Caravan Park for the past 11 years, and it’s truly our favourite time of year. We book three sites with our friends and family and are hoping to extend to a fourth — it’s become a special tradition for us. Even more so now as our mini Groodle could join us!
The park is always well managed and beautifully looked after, which is why we keep coming back year after year. The only suggestion we’d make is that a new amenities block would be a fantastic addition, as the current ones are starting to feel a little old and tired.
Overall, we absolutely love staying here and highly recommend it.

Staying in the campervan, facilities are always kept as clean as can be (over 200 sites and they are ALL FULL) pool and water playground keep the little ones happy, and a very easy and quick walk to the beach

Very difficult with children scooting up and down concrete strips in they electric scooters.and flying toys and balls into the side of car and van. Not shade was a issue for us as I have lupus and can't be in direct sun .

First time at the holiday park.
Good facilities, rooms are tiny but what do you need as you there just to have a sleep.
Kitchen is equiped if you need to cook or it’s a special area to cook that available for everyone and almost empty even at the busiest time.
Slightly overpriced during school holidays and rooms would need a softer pillows.
Would definitely come back for longer period of time as it much to do in the area and explore many beautiful beaches.
And the water pressure in the shower is the best !!!
We had an amazing stay! The service, cleanliness, and location were all excellent. We really enjoyed our time and will definitely come back again.

Great location walking distance to town, bluff walk and inlet
Amenity’s could do with an update just small for the amount of people using the park
First few nights were so noisy and could not sleep.

No sound control at all. Music blasting at night and no staff around to say anything.  Literally could not sleep. A few people complained and staff didn’t do anything. Staff has no consideration for families.  Amenities look family friend, but service is far from.  Has someone who has kids. Definitely won’t be coming back here.

We stayed on the powered site. The on site activities for children were superb! The heated pool and splash park were awesome 👌  The only issue we had was at meal times. During peak season there were anywhere between 4 to 6 families preparing meals and not enough indoor seating. Please consider splitting kitchen facilities in another location on site just like the showers. Also a fridge with a freezer would be super handy. We had a great stay and would definitely recommend it to others!
Great holiday for family with kids. All inclusive, indoor pool and indoor water park (perfect for all weather). Pay for the peddle bikes but they're a great hit with the kids!

We were in our caravan, the ensuite was great (rooms rating). The park is definitely very family oriented & travellers our age really miss out on the facilities due to the masses of young families. Who wants to get in the pool with 100 young kids. Great park for families, not for relaxing adults wanting some peace & quiet. I was so over the lack of parental guidance each morning we woke to balls being bounced past our van at 7am. If you have a young family this is the park for you!
Communication was excellent, including weather warnings. Communal bins emptied regularly and staff lovely.

Lovely park.
Fantastic facilities.
Great for big mother homes.
Thankyou.
Excellent stay! Fabulous friendly staff!
Had a great time glamping
We love Inverloch Big 4; pump track, jumping pillow and pool facilities make sure the kids have plenty to do. Grounds are always beautifully kept and the staff kind and helpful.

Excellent family-friendly park in a great beach location. We went mainky for the indoor waterpark but it was too loud for our little ones. However everything else was brilliant. Superior cabins are huge, new and super clean.

We enjoyed our stay at one of the ensuite sites to the back of the park. Indoor splash park was a huge hit with the kids and swimming pall with a shallow paddling part which was perfect for our little kids. So much to do here with the jumping pillow, playground pump track basketball court and mini golf. We definitely will be back.

The caravan sites are well laid out and spacious and the facilities are clean and well maintained.
The kids facilities with indoor pool and waterpark were very popular, as were the cycle and scooter area.
The park is close enough to Inverloch to walk into town if you fancy
Wonderful family-friendly spot.
Clean, great for kids and adults alike. Staff always helpful and friendly.

Thanks for allowing us to have the same cabin as last year.

Fantastic!
We have never not met nicer people anywhere in the world!
Had a beautiful weekend away here. Great services available and comfy spot
Our first family holiday and absolutely loved it! The entire park, all of the staff and even other visitors were amazing. We are so grateful for our time here, we will be back! Thank you!

Staff and facilities were great. The rooms need some deep cleaning. Moldy silicon in shower and toilet, window trims moldy, behind beds dusty and mold & one of the rooms smelt awful. Would stay again just would request a cleaner room.

We found our site to be generous, fitting our 9m motorhome fine. The toilets down our end were dated and the cubicles small, but all working and cleaned daily. The roads inside the park are wide enough for two cars to pass. Short walk to the beach, fantastic location and town. Great place to base yourself for the region

Powered site, lots of grass areas and beautiful trees attracting bird life.

Great location.
Staff amazing, so friendly and helpful.

The surprising highlight for me was the bed. I suffer from insomnia but we were here for 3 nights and I slept really really well hahaha. The pool and water park were great too. The kids loved it and want to go back.

A great park, with lots of activities for the kids. Very close proximity to the beach and a shop near by for coffee. We had an awesome time here staying on a site with our van, will be back in the future!
Excellent ensuite site. Camp kitchen luxurious as an alternative to outside cooking in rain and cold.
We stayed on a drive-thru van site
Amazing accommodation and location with pool and water play at the park but most of all amazing, friendly, supportive staff that helped our stay with our 3month old alot easier! Thank you!
I would definitely come again for a time next time.

This park is well located and has great facilities for adults and especially the little ones.  We brought our caravan and dog, and stayed on a grassy flat site that was of a decent size.  The staff, especially Janelle, was fantastic, she was friendly and very helpful.  We were showered with advice, lollies and vouchers for ice-cream and peddle karts.  The only minor issue was the amenities block.  Whilst the showers and toilets were clean and cleaned daily, the building needed a spruce up.  There were cobwebs inside and the fly-screen was almost black with dirt. To the point where another guest had written a request to clean the screen on the cleaners check list.  But the cleaner removed the checklist and replaced it with a new one and the fly-screen remained dirty.  Small point to a otherwise great stay. Great facilities for adults and kiddies alike so much so that we are coming back with our grandson soon. Highly recommend this park.
Great kid and pet friendly park. Absolutely will be back

Lovely park for the family. Really enjoyed the water park and pool, plenty to do with kids. Our family spent alot of time in the communal hall space. The only downfall for us were the two ovens in the communal kitchen barely worked so we had to take our dinner out and use our rooms oven and bring back. Thanks for the great stay

The view was very beautiful and all rooms are great with complete equipment. The WiFi is okay. Very clean with lots of things to do, especially with the kids! 🤩👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 #view #rooms #equipment #wifi #cleanliness #activities #kids

The Cabin is lovely

Last minute booking that was available for 2 adults and a small dog in campervan, easy booking via phone as website wasn’t working (showed that it was available, but when you actually went to Click book it said unavailable). Arrived after hours, I received a text message with the plot. We were allocated to however the map at the front gate is out of date!!! so we spent a good hour trying to figure out where we were meant to stay for the night, pulled up in a spot that was listed as the same number we had on the Esplanade only to be met by disgruntled campers, we ended up walking back to the main park and found the after hours person- turned out that the after hours phone was switched to silent. Unfortunately that meant we missed out on using the indoor pool by time we had dinner first, which was such a shame for the $69 we paid. Perfect for families with kids riding around on bikes and scooters, just mind the dog poo in the road at night if walking to the bathrooms!! Toilet block and shower area (good water pressure and hot water- no payment) is a little outdated but clean enough, splash park, indoor pool and Camp kitchen looked good but we didn’t get to use.
Friendly staff, clean toilets, hot showers and well maintained sites, what more could a camper ask for.

We Stayed on a grassed powered site and had a very nice stay. The park is very family orientated and there were many family gatherings happening over the weekend.
Amenities were clean and comfortable.
The staff are very friendly and knowledgeable.
Thank you all.
Deb and Dale
Stayed twice here now. Really enjoy it. Great park.

Clean comfortable cabin.
Like the kids activities.
Appreciated the heater being on at arrival.
Liked the toiletries.
Staff welcoming and friendly.
So close to the beach.

Awesome location.
I stayed in one of the dog friendly cabins.
The garbage bin was an attraction for my dog 🤣 It would be better to have a foot operated one. But wasn't a huge issue.
Kitchen basic. Would love a steamer pot n grater.
But all in all loved my stay there with my fur kid.
Definitely worth going back ♥️

We've just returned home from our very first trip in our 'new to us' caravan with our 2 year old and kelpie. Stayed Friday-Sunday in mid November.

Each occasion I called the park prior to book and then change dates, the reception staff were nothing but helpful and friendly.

The park itself was much busier than we had expected for just a regular weekend and there were kids everywhere! You can see why though as there was so much for them to do plus being so close to Melbourne, it's a great little get away. Might not quite have the room but would be a great idea to try and fit in a walk/bike path next to the main road through the park to help keep the kids safer as did get an bit nuts watching them dart in and out amongst cars towing vans. Our son loved the slash park, pool, jumping pillow and playground and know he will love the pump track too when he's a bit more confident on his bike and scooter to keep up with the big kids.

No complaints from us and we will be back as loved how close it was to the beach (2min walk), a great little corner store with coffees and fish and chips (1min walk) Pizza, burgers, live music and ice cream (also 1min walk)
Awesome caravan park, so much for kids to do with the jumping pillow, pool and pump track.

We had a lovely week in Inverloch at Ingenia. The kids loved the pool and splash park and jumping pillow and had a ball riding around. The weather was against us and our site was grass which ended up being very muddy, completely out of anyone’s control for sure but made it difficult to get out & about. We went into reception a couple of times and had long waits, again, out of the staff’s control but when another person jumped in front of me in the line, no one had noticed that I had been waiting the longest. The doors on the splash park wouldn’t read our wrist bands and had to have help from the staff to get in. The dump point was one of the worst I’ve seen in 6 months of travel - Ingenia - it’s time to upgrade to a dump-ezy and move it to a better location rather than in the main thoroughfare of the park. Tried to use the bbqs but they weren’t hot enough and I had to transfer my plate of uncooked chicken back to our van in high winds.
Thanks for the opportunity to give feedback, looks like there’s some upgrades going on, hopefully there’s some funds going to the functionality of the park rather than packing in more and more units.

We stayed in the pet friendly cottage with a big back yard for the dogs.
Easy friendly check in, great park for kids
Pool, waterpark, mini golf, jumping pillow, skate park, games room, play ground.
It's basically on the beach.
Our only issue was not being able to get a taxi or uber into the racv resort for dinner. Make sure you book early to avoid disappointment.
All good great kitchen in room so we cooked and stayed in for a drink 🍷. Barbeque outside as well.
Had a wonderful stay in a lovely cabin. All amenities were spotless. The only minor complaint would be the 1 ply toilet paper!  9.99 out of 10 xx
Excellent service and would highly recommend
Great place for the kids. The water playground is brilliant. Pool is heated. Staff were really helpful, if you hire the buggies be prepared for a leg workout.
Fantastic park, just needs alot bigger change room in pool/ splash park.

I was on a camping site with ensuite and unfortunately due to the awful weather, our site and tent became a mud pit. We attempted to change sites but due to the amount of mud and water, we had to abandon our stay and forfeit our remaining 2 nights. Although this was a very negative experience for my family, the staff here were nothing but fantastic, particularly Kerri-Ann. They were all understanding, friendly, patient and attempted to offer alternatives - in the end refunding the 2 nights and giving us a bottle of wine. They easily could have just said bad luck. From a very negative experience, the staff turn this into a positive and we will definitely be back. The facilities were also amazing and well maintained, certainly a great stay.

Nice place, plenty for kids to do but is on the pricier side for a caravan park.
Unfortunately we encountered terrible service - rude grounds keeper and unhelpful management which tainted our stay.

Well what a hidden gem, my wife and i plus other family members (they had a caravan on an ensuite site) stayed here for 2 nights, visiting the region from the Mornington Peninsula. We stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin that was extremely comfy annd very neat, tidy with a great layout. The staff at Big 4 Inverloch were fantastic, nothing was to hard for them. The pool is salt water and warm, indoors too and there is an awesome indoor water park for the kids to run amok in... The outdoor BBQ area is great, outside a very well stocked and spacious camp kitchen, the loaction is also very close to a great beach.
Overall a fantastic place to stay in when you next visit Inverloch, we will definetly be coming back again.

Kids loved it.
Thank you to Tanya for great friendly service.
Had a great time. Great  location.Very pleased with the cabin. The facilities at the park were fantastic. Would recommend to everyone.

We had a great stay overall. The kids loved the activities and family friendly options available. The grounds were well maintained, and the reception staff were friendly and welcoming.

The pool area could use a little extra attention with cleaning, there was some build-up in the corners and leaves etc in the bottom of the pool for days. It would also be helpful to have some in-room information about local takeaways and nearby attractions.

Otherwise, a lovely place for families and we would happily stay again.

Excellent value of money - booked for 4-days/3-nights with my family, the place is a 2-min walk to the beach which is awesome - i've enjoyed a walk with coffee. the place was perfect with our toddlers especially during overcast weather they've got to enjoy indoor amenities- so much fun with the heated splash pools, inflatable bounce, trike, etc. We went to variety  of beaches nearby. It exceeded my expectation as its close to everything perfect for travelling families.

Absolutely beautiful place to stay.
Kate at reception was an absolute legend, so helpful.
Another fantastic family weekend at Ingenia Inverloch
Loved our stay there on the lake.  Our TV Didn't work at all but we survived and next time there won't be a problem.

I needed a place to stay overnight that was pet friendly as I was travelling with my dog. The cabin was perfect for my needs, as well as for my dog, with the large, well-fenced courtyard for her to run around safely.
The cabin was so clean and fresh, so I immediately felt relaxed. Overall it was a really great place to stay.
Fabulous family park.  So much for the kids to do. Staff were so accommodating and friendly.  Highly recommend.
Really great parks for kids and family’s and close to town and beach ect

Nice and secure for the kids, pity all the games in the games room need payment. Rooms are neat and tidy, showers are tiny so don’t book if you like to shave your legs cause you’ll end up tangled in the shower curtain on the floor. Great location, lovely town. Kind of wish they had night staff at the park to shut the hooligans up.
Mattress were very uncomfortable dishwasher didnt work other then that amazing service was fast and on to things when needed would cone back
the facilities are absolutely amazing such a fantastic family friendly spot
Had a powered site with ensuite. Park well laid out and very tidy. Plenty for kids to do.

We stayed in our caravan at an excellent drive through site. The surfaces were perfect for the weather we encountered. Facilities were very good and the staff friendly and helpful. This is an excellent park and our stay was enjoyable.

Booked the Eco Tent for hubby's 40th and we had a lovely relaxed time, with plenty to keep our 5 year old busy in site. Appreciated the bottle of wine left in the room also.

Only suggestion is to increase amount of hooks to hang towels on!

This was our first time staying at this park. We definitely will stay again! Very friendly staff. Whenever you pass any of the staff you're greeted with a smile. The park itself was absolutely amazing!! The grand children loved the indoor splash park, pool, jumping pillow and the go carts. Very well kept and clean.
Thanks for our wonderful stay!
The most amazing place to getaway with the whole family!!! Everyone was catered for from grandkids to great grandma. Facilities and staff were top notch. Nothing was a problem.
Very nice stay great location easy to get to Philip Island for MotoGP
Fantastic stay in a caravan drive through staff and location as well as site fab
Very nice place and staff beach just a walk away can’t wait to bring my kids here
I mean, do you need anything else? Plenty of space, clean amenities and access to the beach.
We had a great time during our stay! The amenities and services were great!
Very friendly staff. Very clean park with lots of amenities and great location for exploring the area.

Stayed in own van. Slightly tight fit, ( we have large van. Great facilities. Fantastic for kids.heaps of activities for them. Extremely clean facilities and grounds.
Highly recommend
Lovely Park with awesome facilities and lovely helpful and friendly staff 👏🏻☺️
Fabulous family holiday - 4 families - we rented two cabins and two caravan sites with ensuites

Reluctant to stay again because of this stupid rule.
Great park for kids. Well maintained

We had a great stay. Water park and pool were excellent. Other amenities were standard Big 4 and good. Games room an expensive, underwhelming visit but overall fantastic.
Amazing stay with our family of 7. Something for everyone, from toddlers to teenagers. Cabin was perfect, new and clean. Can not fault.
What a wonderful place to stay at Ingenia Inverloch ....so much for the kids to do , great amenities,  friendly helpful staff . We can't wait to return
Was a great cabin just disappointed that there was no early check in or late check out for the $310 for one night 3 pm check in and 10 am check out is a lot money
We thought it was ok for the price you pay the kitchen  could of been cleaner

We had an amazing week in the lv poolside cabins. Defiantly will be booking this accommodation again! Staff were amazing especially the maintenance crew and pool supervisors! Areas were always clean and the food trucks were tasty!!!!
People at reception made us welcome and adjusted dates when I couldn’t travel 3 months ago due to illness. Very helpful.

NOT happy at all! i had a cabin there for nearly 10 years and it was my whole childhood and i absolutely adored the place, until igenia took over and gave us 30 days notice to pretty much get out and demolish our cabin or move it else where we spent so much money on renovating, and all the fees all year round. they wanted to get rid of us and many other cabin owners for ‘campsite land’. many cabins like ours who had so many memories with our families and money lost because of igenia. igenia had no sympathy what so ever.

Booked a cabin with porta cots but the rooms couldn’t fit porta cots at all, asked to be near the kids area upon booking 6 weeks prior and got stuck as far away as possible, fridge had mould growing in it. We have stayed at other big 4’s but they weren’t this bad.

I'm not usually one to complain but wasn't happy at all with the stay. To start with cabin was smaller than what I saw in pictures, on top of that the room wasn't at all that clean..  it even had a prerogative msg under the bunk bed slat that my 6 year old saw..
I had a 6 year old n 15 month old so maybe wasn't ideal for our family.. I thought being holidays there wouldve been activities for indoor being that we were stuck in the room while it was raining.. Ended the trip early and couldn't wait to get home.. i don't think ill be back..

We recently stayed for 2 nights is budget cabin and it was great. All you need and kitchen has everything to prepare meals. Lots to do for the kids.
